name: BMR Katch-McArdle Calculator
desc: BMR Calculator (Katch-McArdle). Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free bmr calculator (katch-mcardle) to quickly estimate bmr_katch, lbm based on peso_kg, height_cm, edad. Not registration needed.
formula_display: Calculate bmr katch mcardle based on input values.
steps: Enter input values: peso_kg: 70, height_cm: 175, edad: 30, sexo: mujer, grasa_pct: 20
Calculate and display the bmr_katch result
Calculate and display the lbm result
Calculate and display the tdee result
mistakes: Confusing unit options when entering values
Entering zero or negative values where positive required
Using incorrect input values outside recommended range
